summary: Completed frontend testing of room page visual unification. Successfully verified the dashboard-aligned design implementation with navy/soft palette, rounded-2xl cards, consistent styling, and maintained functionality.
passed_tests: Room page loads successfully with visual unification applied
All cards (header, participants, timer, chat) use rounded-2xl (16px) border-radius consistently
Navy/soft dark color palette implemented instead of previous purple theme
Cards use soft shadows (rgba(15,23,42,0.45) 0px 12px 30px -24px) matching dashboard style
Background uses dashboard-aligned colors (rgb(248,250,252) body, rgba(255,255,255,0.95) cards)
Border colors consistent with dashboard theme (rgba(224,229,235,0.7))
Timer functionality preserved - start button clickable and enabled
Chat functionality working - messages can be sent and displayed properly
User list displays cleanly with minimal borders and proper participant styling
Room header maintains proper structure with room name and code display
Grid layout structure preserved with proper responsive behavior
No purple theme elements detected in visual inspection
All main UI elements present and accessible via data-testid attributes
Timer display maintains minimal design while being sufficiently visible
Chat area has clean spacing and improved readability
